title: Lab Expansion
description: We are expanding our lab space to accommodate new GPU clusters.

title: New Grant Awarded

title: Keynote at SC26
description: Dr. Sarah Chen will be giving the keynote address at Supercomputing 2026.

title: Paper Accepted to NeurIPS
description: Our paper on sparse attention mechanisms was accepted.

title: Welcome New PhD Students
description: Welcoming 5 new PhD students to the Per4ML lab.

title: Open Source Release

title: Best Paper Award

title: Industry Partnership
description: Partnering with TechCorp to optimize their ML pipelines.

title: Workshop Organized

title: New Cluster Online

title: Research Highlighted
description: Our work was featured in Nature Computational Science.

description: Kicking off the new academic year with exciting projects.
